name: orders domain agent — golden trajectory
description: Regression gate for the illustrative `orders` domain. The lever is the tool-call trajectory: with tool_trajectory_avg_score=1.0 (see test_config.json) a wrong, reordered, or dropped tool call fails the build. Generated agents replace this with domain-specific golden trajectories whose tools take explicit scalar args (e.g. validate_inputs -> evaluate_risk -> calculate_pricing -> evaluate_decisioning for a credit pipeline), which are stable to assert exactly.

parts.text: I can create an order, get an order, and cancel an order.
